about.description:
PlantSeg is a tool for cell instance aware segmentation in densely packed 3D volumetric images.
The pipeline uses a two stage segmentation strategy (Neural Network + Graph Partitioning).
The pipeline is tuned for plant cell tissue acquired with confocal and light sheet microscopy.
Pre-trained models are provided.
about.summary: Cell instance segmentation in densely packed 3D volumetric images

about.description:
PlantSeg is a tool for cell instance aware segmentation in densely packed 3D volumetric images.
The pipeline uses a two stage segmentation strategy (Neural Network + Graph Partitioning).
The pipeline is tuned for plant cell tissue acquired with confocal and light sheet microscopy.
Pre-trained models are provided.
about.summary: Cell instance segmentation in densely packed 3D volumetric images

name: plant-seg
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set PYTHON_MIN = "3.11" %}
{% set VERSION = "2.0.0b4" %}
{% set SHA256 = "a476c08a46b3399396df5e0d6f95fbcba54269df853b0f647bf1ea6c217015fb" %}
# curl -sL https://github.com/kreshuklab/plant-seg/archive/refs/tags/2.0.0a4.tar.gz | openssl sha256

package:
  name: plant-seg
  version: {{ VERSION }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/kreshuklab/plant-seg/archive/refs/tags/{{ VERSION }}.tar.gz
  sha256: {{ SHA256 }}

build:
  noarch: python
  number: 0
  script:
    - "{{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation --ignore-installed --no-cache-dir"
    - "mkdir -p {{ PREFIX }}/Menu"  # [not win]
    - "cp {{ SRC_DIR }}/Menu/plant-seg.json {{ PREFIX }}/Menu/{{ PKG_NAME }}_menu.json"  # [not win]
    - "cp {{ SRC_DIR }}/Menu/icon.png {{ PREFIX }}/Menu/icon.png"  # [not win]
    - "cp {{ SRC_DIR }}/Menu/logo_horizontal.png {{ PREFIX }}/Menu/logo_horizontal.png"  # [not win]
    - "cp {{ SRC_DIR }}/Menu/logo_vertical.png {{ PREFIX }}/Menu/logo_vertical.png"  # [not win]

  entry_points:
    - plantseg = plantseg.run_plantseg:main

requirements:
  build:
    - python {{ PYTHON_MIN }}
    - pip
    - setuptools

  run:
    - python >={{ PYTHON_MIN }}
    - pip
    - pytorch
    - tifffile
    - h5py
    - zarr
    - vigra
    - python-elf
    - python-graphviz
    - scikit-image
    - bioimageio.core >=0.6.5,<=0.7.0
    - xarray <2025.3.0 # 2025.3.0 cause problem plant-seg/issues/396
    - qtpy
    - pyqt
    - napari
    - requests
    - pyyaml
    - pydantic >2,<2.10 # 2.10 cause problem spec-bioimage-io/issues/663

test:
  requires:
    - python {{ PYTHON_MIN }}
  imports:
    - plantseg

about:
  home: https://kreshuklab.github.io/plant-seg/
  summary: 'Cell instance segmentation in densely packed 3D volumetric images'
  description: |
    PlantSeg is a tool for cell instance aware segmentation in densely packed 3D volumetric images.
    The pipeline uses a two stage segmentation strategy (Neural Network + Graph Partitioning).
    The pipeline is tuned for plant cell tissue acquired with confocal and light sheet microscopy.
    Pre-trained models are provided.
  license: MIT
  license_family: MIT
  license_file: LICENSE
  doc_url: https://kreshuklab.github.io/plant-seg/
  dev_url: https://github.com/kreshuklab/plant-seg

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - KRiedmiller
    - lorenzocerrone
    - wolny
    - qin-yu
